title: Directors of NIH Institutes and Centers | National Institutes of Health (NIH)
content: List of Institutes and Centers NIH Office of the Director Directors of NIH Institutes and Centers Directors of NIH Institutes and Centers Directors of NIH Institutes and Centers NIH Director Jay Bhattacharya, M.D., Ph.D. NIH Director Institute Directors Anthony Letai, M.D., Ph.D. National Cancer Institute (NCI) Michael Chiang, M.D. National Eye Institute (NEI) David Goff, M.D., Ph.D. (Acting) National Heart, Lung, and Blood Institute (NHLBI) Carolyn Hutter, Ph.D. (Acting) National Human Genome Research Institute (NHGRI) Richard Hodes, M.D. National Institute on Aging (NIA) George Koob, Ph.D. National Institute on Alcohol Abuse and Alcoholism (NIAAA) Jeff Taubenberger, Ph.D. (Acting) National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) Anna Mazzucco, Ph.D. (Acting) National Institute of Arthritis and Musculoskeletal and Skin Diseases (NIAMS) Bruce Tromberg, Ph.D. National Institute of Biomedical Imaging and Bioengineering (NIBIB) Alison Cernich, Ph.D. (Acting) Eunice Kennedy Shriver National Institute of Child Health and Human Development (NICHD) Debara Tucci, M.D., M.S., M.B.A. National Institute on Deafness and Other Communication Disorders (NIDCD) Jennifer Webster-Cyriaque, D.D.S., Ph.D. (Acting) National Institute of Dental and Craniofacial Research (NIDCR) Griffin Rodgers, M.D., M.A.C.P.
